query: What is the revenue CAGR for NVIDIA from 2020–2024?
title: NVIDIA Revenue CAGR Analysis (2020–2024)
executive_summary: NVIDIA achieved a revenue CAGR of 42.3% between 2020 and 2024, driven primarily by accelerating demand for data center GPUs.
markdown:
## Analysis

NVIDIA's revenue grew from $10.9B in FY2020 to $60.9B in FY2024.

<!-- CHART:revenue_cagr -->

## Methodology

CAGR calculated as `(end/start)^(1/n) - 1`.

*This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice.*
